ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track (0-1) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track (0-1) */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track (0-1) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track (0-1) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track (0-1) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track (0-1) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track (0-1) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (0-1) */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the track (0-100) */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "album_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album art */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number on the album */,
  "disc_number" INTEGER /* Disc number in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist is known for */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the artist (0-100) */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the album (0-100) */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "copyrights" TEXT /* Copyright information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the playlist image */,
  "privacy_status" TEXT /* Privacy status (public, private, etc.) */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is collaborative */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist the track belongs to */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the service */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., admin, data analyst, user) */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playlists" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Access type (owner, collaborator, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "playlist_id")
)
